title: NEOGEN INVESTOR ALERT by the Former Attorney General of Louisiana: Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC Investigates Merger of NEOGEN Corporation - NEOG
text: NEW ORLEANS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Former Attorney General of Louisiana Charles C. Foti, Jr., Esq. and the law firm of Kahn Swick & Foti, LLC (“KSF”) are investigating the proposed merger of NEOGEN Corporation (“the Company”) (NasdaqGS: NEOG) with 3M (NYSE: MMM) pursuant to which shareholders of NEOGEN will own only approximately 49.9% of the combined company. KSF is seeking to determine whether the merger and the process that led to it are adequate, or whether the merger undervalues the Company
